summary: Standalone Chat workspace, Funky alerts, sidebar counts, and a refreshed app icon.

introduced: Google Chat as its own sidebar workspace with per-account tabs and unread badges
Funky alert sound for new email, chat messages, and upcoming calendar reminders
changed: Sidebar now shows unread counts for Inbox and Chat, plus today’s upcoming meetings on Calendar
App and website icons updated to the new Nucleus mark with transparent background
fixed: Chat notifications continue in the background via hidden unread pollers when Chat is not open
